answer_rubric.answer_goal: 对比 independent/fused mode 的数据路径差异。

required_atoms.statement: Independent mode 使用 memory-to-memory 路径
Fused mode 通过 FIFO pipeline 连接 block，减少中间内存往返

evidence.statement: Architecture doc contrasts memory-to-memory independent mode with pipelined fused mode through FIFOs.

expected_answer: Independent mode 是每个 block 独立配置并执行自己的任务，输入输出走主存或 SRAM 的 memory-to-memory 路径；fused mode 可以把一些 block 组成 pipeline，通过小 FIFO 直接通信，绕过中间回写内存 `repo_sources/nvdla/doc/doc/hw/v1/hwarch.rst:19-20`。

answer_rubric.answer_goal: 判断 dla_bdma_enable 的 zero-transfer launch 行为。

forbidden_atoms.statement: num_transfers=0 时仍会写 CFG_LAUNCH0 或 CFG_LAUNCH1

required_atoms.statement: num_transfers=0 时 dla_bdma_enable 不会 launch 硬件
early goto exit 发生在 CFG_LAUNCH0/1 写寄存器之前

evidence.statement: dla_bdma_enable checks num_transfers == 0, sets OP_COMPLETED, and jumps to exit.
CFG_LAUNCH0/CFG_LAUNCH1 writes are below the early exit path.

expected_answer: 不会。`dla_bdma_enable` 先判断 `num_transfers == 0`，若成立就设置 `DLA_EVENT_OP_COMPLETED` 并 `goto exit` `repo_sources/nvdla/sw/kmd/firmware/bdma.c:85-95`；真正 launch 的 `CFG_LAUNCH0/CFG_LAUNCH1` 写寄存器在后面的分支中 `repo_sources/nvdla/sw/kmd/firmware/bdma.c:103-111`，因此 zero-transfer 路径会绕过 launch。

query_rewrite: 判断 bdma.c 中 dla_bdma_enable 在 num_transfers=0 时是否还会 launch 硬件。

answer_rubric.answer_goal: 判断 zero-transfer 是否进入 BDMA slot 编程循环。

forbidden_atoms.statement: num_transfers=0 时仍进入 processor_bdma_program_slot 循环

required_atoms.statement: num_transfers=0 时不会调用 processor_bdma_program_slot
zero-transfer check 位于 for 循环之前

evidence.statement: dla_bdma_program reads bdma_surface and exits when num_transfers == 0.
processor_bdma_program_slot is called inside the loop after the zero-transfer check.

expected_answer: 不会。`dla_bdma_program` 在读取 `bdma_surface->num_transfers` 后，如果值为 0 就直接 `goto exit` `repo_sources/nvdla/sw/kmd/firmware/bdma.c:255-260`；`processor_bdma_program_slot` 只在后续 `for` 循环中调用 `repo_sources/nvdla/sw/kmd/firmware/bdma.c:267-272`。

query_rewrite: 判断 bdma.c 中 dla_bdma_program 在 num_transfers=0 时是否进入 processor_bdma_program_slot 循环。

answer_rubric.answer_goal: 判断 BDMA 超过最大 transfer 数时的处理。

forbidden_atoms.statement: 超过 NUM_MAX_BDMA_OPS 时仍继续编程所有 transfer

required_atoms.statement: num_transfers 超过 NUM_MAX_BDMA_OPS 时不会继续正常编程
代码返回 ERR(INVALID_INPUT)

evidence.statement: dla_bdma_program rejects num_transfers > NUM_MAX_BDMA_OPS with INVALID_INPUT and exit.
The transfer programming loop and interrupt enable happen after the max-transfer guard.

expected_answer: 不会继续正常编程。`dla_bdma_program` 对 `num_transfers > NUM_MAX_BDMA_OPS` 报 Invalid number of transfers，设置 `ERR(INVALID_INPUT)` 并跳到 exit `repo_sources/nvdla/sw/kmd/firmware/bdma.c:261-265`；slot 编程循环和中断 enable 在该 guard 之后 `repo_sources/nvdla/sw/kmd/firmware/bdma.c:267-275`。

answer_rubric.answer_goal: 解释 BDMA slot 编程的寄存器顺序和 enable 点。

required_atoms.statement: BDMA slot 在完成地址和尺寸配置后通过 CFG_OP EN=ENABLE 启动该 OP
CFG_SRC/DST、CFG_LINE、CFG_CMD、repeat/stride 在 CFG_OP 前写入

answer_rubric.answer_goal: 说明 BDMA readiness 与 shadow group 限制。

answer_rubric.answer_goal: 解释 utils_get_free_group 的 idle group/rdma 选择逻辑。

required_atoms.statement: 两个 group idle 时 group_id 来自 hw_consumer_ptr
RDMA idle 时 rdma_id 来自 hw_rdma_ptr

evidence.statement: utils_get_free_group uses hardware consumer pointers when group_status/rdma_status are clear; otherwise shifts status.
